characters.name: "Jerry"
characters.description:
"Jerry"DebutUnfairgroundsGenderMaleStatusAliveOccupationRide operator"Jerry"is a citizen of theUnikingdomand employee ofDoki Diamond Fun Land. "Jerry" is a lime green citizen with a semicircular head and red wheels for feet.
He wears a blue shirt with a white bandana, a red and white sailor hat, and black square-rimmed glasses. ???? ????

characters.name: Background Characters
characters.description: These are some of the variousbackground characterswho appear in the animated series,Unikitty! Theladybugis a recurring insect. She has a red shell with a purple stripe on the bottom. Her head is round and yellow, with small eyes with a single eyelash and highlight in them, along with a pair of black antenna. She has six black tube-like legs.Puppycornhas a tendency to trip over her. Her voice actor isTara Strong, and debuted in "Spoooooky Game".

characters.name: Burger Person
characters.description: Burger PersonDebutFire & NiceGenderMaleStatusAliveLikesPartiesDislikesBeing eatenVoice ActorDana Snyder Burger Personis a hamburger citizen ofUnikingdom. His voice actor isTara Strong. Burger Person is an anthropomorphic cheeseburger, with his meat acting like his mouth, and lettuce, cheese, tomatoes, and pickles inside of him, on top of a sesame seed bun, which his arms and legs are made of. He has large black eyes and thick eyebrows. ????

characters.description: Connected CitizensDebutFire & NiceGenderMale (Both)StatusAliveLikesPartiesDislikesBeing connected with someone else Connected Citizensare a pair of connected citizens that reside inUnikingdom. The connected citizens are as-of-yet unnamed citizens. They are a pair of bricks, the top one is a lime slope with arms that disappear and reappear and dot eyes, and the bottom is an aqua-rounded rectangle with round legs. ????

characters.description: Cookie GuyDebutFire & NiceGenderMaleStatusAliveLikesCookie HouseCookie Guyis a cookie citizen ofUnikingdom. Cookie Guy is a cookie citizen.
